mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.uid2 AS "uid2.id", a.sinfo AS "sinfo", a.bei AS "bei", a.info AS "info", a.state AS "state", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex",
uid2.nickname AS "uid2.nickname", uid2.icon AS "uid2.icon", uid2.huanying AS "uid2.huanying", uid2.sex AS "uid2.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_member uid2 ON uid2.id = a.uid2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_friend_apply( id, uid, uid2, sinfo, bei, info, state, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{uid2.id}, #{sinfo}, #{bei}, #{info}, #{state}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_friend_apply SET uid = #{u.id}, uid2 = #{uid2.id}, sinfo = #{sinfo}, bei = #{bei}, info = #{info}, state = #{state}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
